Hero.description: Micrometer precision for high-performance weaving machines. Durable spare parts manufactured with carbon fiber technology.

About.paragraph1: As Perfect Carbon Rapier, we redefine high performance and micrometer precision in the industrial carpet weaving sector. We use top-tier carbon composite technologies to push the limits of world-leading weaving systems such as Van de Wiele, Dornier, and Schönherr.
About.paragraph2: The lightweight carbon rapiers, rapier tapes, and high-speed mechanical components we manufacture minimize loom downtime while allowing your production lines to smoothly reach maximum RPM capacity. From engineering to delivery, we integrate the weaving technology of the future into today's factories.

Process.title: From design to delivery
Process.topDescription: Compact vertical steps of transformation from raw carbon to high-performance spare parts.

step1.title: Custom CAD Modeling
step1.description: Micrometer-precision CAD modeling and simulation processes specific to your loom type and speed requirements.

step2.title: Advanced Carbon Layup
step2.description: Flawless curing of high-strength T800 carbon prepreg layers in an autoclave under controlled pressure.

step3.title: Rigid Stress Testing
step3.description: Each manufactured spare part successfully passes tensile, bending, and high-RPM fatigue tests.

step4.title: Global Fast Shipping
step4.description: Vacuumed special protective packaging and global express delivery that minimizes your loom downtime.

Contact.description: Fill out the form or write to us directly to minimize your loom downtime and plan the most durable carbon spare parts.
